description: Restore border-radius (rounded) to all components that had it removed by previous AI agent tasks, and fix the oversized copy button in code block headers. The theme defines --radius: 0.5rem but a previous commit (39c81cb) stripped the `rounded` Tailwind class from Button, Accordion, copy button, and other components. A subsequent commit (98290a8) removed it from Callout and Card too. This PRD restores `rounded` everywhere it was removed and fixes the copy button sizing regression from the touch target task.
qualityChecks: cd docs && bun run build && bun run type-check && bun run lint && bun run knip

userStories.title: Restore rounded to Button component base styles
userStories.description: As a user, I want buttons to have border-radius matching the theme's --radius: 0.5rem so that they look rounded, not boxy.
acceptanceCriteria: The buttonVariants cva base string in docs/components/retroui/Button.tsx includes the `rounded` class
The `rounded` class appears immediately after `font-head` in the base string for readability
No other changes to Button.tsx — do not add or remove any other classes
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
userStories.notes:
In docs/components/retroui/Button.tsx line 8, the cva base string is currently:
'font-head transition-all outline-hidden cursor-pointer duration-200 font-medium flex justify-center items-center disabled:opacity-60 disabled:cursor-not-allowed'

Add `rounded` after `font-head`:
'font-head rounded transition-all outline-hidden cursor-pointer duration-200 font-medium flex justify-center items-center disabled:opacity-60 disabled:cursor-not-allowed'

This was removed in commit 39c81cb. The `rounded` Tailwind class maps to the theme's --radius variable (0.5rem) via the @theme inline block in global.css.

userStories.notes:
Three edits needed in docs/mdx-components.tsx:

1. Line 31 (RetroCallout): Change
   'relative my-6 w-full border-2 p-4 md:p-5'
   to
   'relative my-6 w-full rounded border-2 p-4 md:p-5'

2. Line 63 (RetroCard link variant): Change
   'bg-card block border-2 p-4 shadow-md transition-all hover:translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-none'
   to

3. Line 72 (RetroCard div variant): Change
   'bg-card border-2 p-4 shadow-md transition-all hover:shadow-none'
   to
   'bg-card rounded border-2 p-4 shadow-md transition-all hover:shadow-none'

These were removed in commit 98290a8.

userStories.title: Restore rounded to code block container and fix copy button sizing
userStories.description: As a user, I want code blocks to have rounded corners and the copy button in the title bar to be properly sized (not oversized from the touch target change).
acceptanceCriteria: The code block <figure> className in docs/components/retroui-codeblock.tsx includes `rounded`
The RetroCopyButton no longer has `min-h-11 min-w-11` classes
The RetroCopyButton retains its existing `p-1.5` padding for proper sizing
The copy button fits within the title bar (min-h-10 = 40px) without overflow
No other changes to the file
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
userStories.notes:
Two edits needed in docs/components/retroui-codeblock.tsx:

1. Line 49 (RetroCopyButton): Remove `min-h-11 min-w-11` from the className. Change:
   'inline-flex min-h-11 min-w-11 cursor-pointer items-center justify-center border-2 p-1.5 transition-all'
   to:
   'inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded border-2 p-1.5 transition-all'
   Note: also add `rounded` back here (was removed in 39c81cb).

2. Line 92 (code block figure): Change:
   'shiki not-prose border-border relative my-6 overflow-hidden border-2 text-sm shadow-md'
   to:
   'shiki not-prose border-border relative my-6 overflow-hidden rounded border-2 text-sm shadow-md'

The `min-h-11 min-w-11` was added by commit 34cadfe (touch target task) which made the copy button 44px, but the title bar is only min-h-10 (40px). The copy button is a precision UI element inside a header, not a standalone touch target — it doesn't need the 44px minimum. The p-1.5 padding already makes it adequately tappable.

userStories.notes:

3. Line 113 (step number indicator): Change:

   to:

These cards never had `rounded` in the first place (they were created after the rounded-removal commit), but they should follow the theme.
